operatorAssertion: No active detours were identified during the original review; corrected on 2026-07-10 because Route 8B had an official Shanty Bay detour active from July 6 to September 4.
assessment: Eight reporting routes produced clean true-negative output. Route 8B was removed from the true-negative set after the official July 6 to September 4 Shanty Bay detour was confirmed. Six rider-visible records on five other routes were still public despite operator-confirmed normal routing and require stale-clear remediation; their original detections may still have been valid historically.
